openmeter/productcatalog/subscription/ht.purpose: v1 HTTP driver for plan-aware subscription lifecycle endpoints (create, get, list, edit, cancel, continue, restore, change, migrate, delete). Translates between api.* and domain types, delegating to PlanSubscriptionService, SubscriptionWorkflowService, and SubscriptionService via httptransport.HandlerWithArgs.

patterns.name: HandlerWithArgs type alias pattern
patterns.description: Each operation defines Request/Response/Params/Handler aliases then a method on *handler returning httptransport.NewHandlerWithArgs(decoder, operation, encoder, options...).

patterns.name: Namespace resolved first in every decoder
patterns.description: Every decoder lambda calls h.resolveNamespace(ctx) first; failure returns 500. Namespace is never read from the request body.
patterns.example: ns, err := h.resolveNamespace(ctx); if err != nil { return ..., err }

patterns.name: Custom-plan discriminator sniff via marshal+unmarshal
patterns.description: oapi-codegen As* helpers succeed on any structurally-serializable body, so create.go/change.go marshal then unmarshal checking for the customPlan field before calling As*.
patterns.example: type testForCustomPlan struct { CustomPlan any `json:"customPlan"` }; json.Unmarshal(bodyBytes, &t); if t.CustomPlan != nil { body.AsCustomSubscriptionCreate() }

patterns.name: Credits guard in decoder, not in operation
patterns.description: If !h.Credits.Enabled && req.SettlementMode == CreditOnlySettlementMode the decoder returns models.NewGenericValidationError; domain services are deployment-agnostic.

patterns.name: Centralized errorEncoder shared by all handlers
patterns.description: errors.go's single errorEncoder() maps subscription patch errors, entitlement errors, feature.FeatureNotFoundError, pagination.InvalidError; appended via WithErrorEncoder on every handler.

patterns.name: All domain-to-API conversions in mapping.go
patterns.description: MapSubscriptionToAPI, MapSubscriptionViewToAPI, MapSubscriptionPhaseToAPI, MapAPITimingToTiming, MapAPISubscriptionEditOperationToPatch, CustomPlanToCreatePlanRequest are the only conversion points.

patterns.name: HandlerConfig struct injection
patterns.description: *handler embeds HandlerConfig holding all services (workflow, subscription, customer, plansubscription, namespace decoder, logger, credits). New methods must not add deps outside HandlerConfig.
patterns.example: type HandlerConfig struct { SubscriptionWorkflowService subscriptionworkflow.Service; PlanSubscriptionService plansubscription.PlanSubscriptionService; ... }

key_file_guides.role: Handler interface listing all operation methods, HandlerConfig with all deps, NewHandler constructor.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Every new operation needs a method on Handler and its services must already be in HandlerConfig — do not inline services into operation files.

key_file_guides.role: All bidirectional domain↔api.* conversions including phase item selection (current=active, future=first, past=last).
key_file_guides.watch_for: MapSubscriptionPhaseToAPI relativePhaseTime branching determines which items appear in responses — changes affect all GET subscription responses.

key_file_guides.role: Centralized error→HTTP-status mapping; ValidationIssues handled first via HandleIssueIfHTTPStatusKnown, then types via HandleErrorIfTypeMatches.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New domain error types needing non-500 status must be registered here; omitting silently yields 500.

key_file_guides.role: CreateSubscription with custom-plan sniff; resolves customer via getCustomer (returns 412 GenericPreConditionFailedError for deleted customers).
key_file_guides.watch_for: getCustomer must be called and its error propagated before PlanSubscriptionService.Create.

key_file_guides.role: ChangeSubscription with the same custom-plan sniff; credits guard only in the custom plan path.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Timing is mandatory in the change body; credits guard applies only on the AsCustomSubscriptionChange() path.

anti_patterns: Calling SubscriptionService directly for workflow operations (create/change/edit/restore/migrate) — route through PlanSubscriptionService or SubscriptionWorkflowService.
Putting validation/transformation in the operation lambda — it belongs in the decoder (first lambda).
Using As* helpers without the marshal+unmarshal discriminator sniff — they succeed on wrong types and produce zero values.
Registering a handler operation without adding its method to the Handler interface.
Returning a domain error not covered by errorEncoder — it silently becomes a 500.

decisions.decision: Custom-plan discriminator sniff via marshal+unmarshal instead of generated As* helpers.
decisions.rationale: Union helpers succeed if the JSON is structurally serializable even for the wrong member; field presence is the only reliable discriminator.

decisions.decision: Credits.Enabled guard in the HTTP decoder, not the domain service.
decisions.rationale: The HTTP driver owns deployment config; domain services are deployment-agnostic so the flag belongs at the transport boundary.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new subscription action endpoint (PauseSubscription)

openmeter/productcatalog/subscription/se.purpose: Concrete plansubscription.PlanSubscriptionService — bridges the product catalog (plan key/version, status) to the generic subscription.Plan interface by resolving plans, validating status, applying zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase, and delegating all persistence to subscriptionworkflow.Service.

patterns.name: PlanInput dual-path: ref vs inline
patterns.description: Methods accepting PlanInput check AsInput() for an inline custom plan (PlanFromPlanInput), then AsRef() for a catalog reference (getPlanByVersion with status validation); both end in WorkflowService delegation.
patterns.example: if request.PlanInput.AsInput() != nil { p, err := PlanFromPlanInput(*request.PlanInput.AsInput()) } else if request.PlanInput.AsRef() != nil { p, err := s.getPlanByVersion(ctx, ns, *request.PlanInput.AsRef()) }

patterns.name: Plan status validation before workflow delegation
patterns.description: After fetching by ref, verify p.StatusAt(clock.Now()) == PlanStatusActive (Migrate also allows Archived); else return models.NewGenericValidationError.
patterns.example: if pStatus != productcatalog.PlanStatusActive { return def, models.NewGenericValidationError(fmt.Errorf("plan %s@%d is not active at %s", p.Key, p.Version, now)) }

patterns.name: zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase on StartingPhase
patterns.description: When request.StartingPhase is set, call s.zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase(p, *request.StartingPhase) before PlanFromPlan; it sets zero-duration ISODuration on earlier phases without removing them.
patterns.example: if request.StartingPhase != nil { if err := s.zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase(p, *request.StartingPhase); err != nil { return def, err } }

patterns.name: All persistence delegated to WorkflowService
patterns.description: No DB writes in this package; only WorkflowService.CreateFromPlan and ChangeToPlan persist.
patterns.example: curr, new, err := s.WorkflowService.ChangeToPlan(ctx, request.ID, request.WorkflowInput, plan)

patterns.name: Migrate timing auto-selection when nil
patterns.description: Migrate tries TimingImmediate first; if ValidateForAction fails it falls back to TimingNextBillingCycle.
patterns.example: timing = subscription.Timing{Enum: lo.ToPtr(subscription.TimingImmediate)}; if err := timing.ValidateForAction(...); err != nil { timing = subscription.Timing{Enum: lo.ToPtr(subscription.TimingNextBillingCycle)} }

key_file_guides.role: Config (WorkflowService + SubscriptionService + PlanService + CustomerService + Logger), New() returning PlanSubscriptionService, zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase helper.
key_file_guides.watch_for: WorkflowService and SubscriptionService are separate fields serving different roles — do not collapse them.

key_file_guides.role: getPlanByVersion (maps IsNotFound to subscription.NewPlanNotFoundError), PlanFromPlanInput (inline validation with temporary key='cheat'/version=1), PlanFromPlan.
key_file_guides.watch_for: PlanFromPlanInput sets Key='cheat', Version=1 temporarily for validation; downstream must not rely on those being real.

key_file_guides.role: Create: resolves plan, validates status, applies zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase, calls WorkflowService.CreateFromPlan, returns subscription.Subscription.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Returns Subscription not SubscriptionView — callers needing the view call GetView separately.

key_file_guides.role: Migrate: enforces version strictly greater than current, allows Active or Archived status, auto-selects timing when nil, delegates to ChangeToPlan.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Migrate allows Archived plans (unlike Change which requires Active); the strict-greater version check is critical correctness.

anti_patterns: Adding Ent/DB calls directly — all DB writes go through WorkflowService or SubscriptionService.
Removing the validation 'cheat' in PlanFromPlanInput without an alternative validation path for inline plans.
Calling plan.Service.GetPlan directly instead of getPlanByVersion — the helper normalises NotFound to subscription.NewPlanNotFoundError.
Setting StartingPhase without calling zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase — earlier phases won't collapse correctly.

decisions.rationale: WorkflowService operates on the generic subscription.Plan interface and is catalog-unaware; PlanSubscriptionService bridges catalog key/version/status to it.

decisions.decision: zeroPhasesBeforeStartingPhase sets Duration=0 instead of deleting phases.
decisions.rationale: Deleting phases would shift array indices and break keyed lookups; zero-duration phases are effectively skipped without restructuring.

openmeter/productcatalog/subscription/te.purpose: Test-only helper providing a PlanSubscriptionAdapter implementation that wraps plan.Service into the interface needed by service_test files, enabling plan resolution (by ref or inline input) without importing app/common Wire wiring.

patterns.name: PlanSubscriptionAdapter interface for test isolation
patterns.description: Minimal PlanSubscriptionAdapter (GetVersion, FromInput) with a compile-time assertion so tests resolve plans without the full DI graph.

patterns.name: GetVersion maps plan.IsNotFound to subscription.NewPlanNotFoundError
patterns.description: GetVersion delegates to plan.Service.GetPlan, maps IsNotFound to subscription.NewPlanNotFoundError, and checks DeletedAt before returning.

key_file_guides.role: Entire package: PlanSubscriptionAdapter interface, Config, adapter struct, NewPlanSubscriptionAdapter, GetVersion and FromInput.
key_file_guides.watch_for: GetVersion checks p.DeletedAt before returning — removing it silently allows deleted plans in tests. FromInput delegates to service.PlanFromPlanInput which uses the 'cheat' key/version — tests must not rely on a real key/version.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common or any Wire provider — this package must stay independent to avoid test import cycles.
Reaching into the Ent DB directly instead of going through plan.Service — bypasses the validation paths production uses.

decisions.decision: PlanSubscriptionAdapter lives in testutils rather than inlined per test.
decisions.rationale: Multiple service_test files need the same plan-resolution logic; the adapter DRYs it up without leaking production code paths.
